title: Sales Manager Vacancy at NAREDCO - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at NAREDCO - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
NAREDCO, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Surat operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NAREDCO:
NAREDCO is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NAREDCO!
